title: Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory
description: From our flagship publication Science and Technology Review to our employee-focused SpotLight magazine, learn what we're up to at Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory.
text:
Where the Science Things Are
Take an imaginative look at LLNL through our recently released children’s book, “Where the Science Things Are.” In this creative exploration of the Lab, follow a young boy’s journey as his dream takes him forward in time to see LLNL today and learn about our incredible contributions to making the world a safer place.
